data.body: 08a8 claimed + advisories dispositioned. Authored oracle: test_release_workflow_pins.py (11 structural checks, RED), test_check_build_env_locked.py + test_mcp_publisher_pin.py (script behavioral, edge cases held out in tmp; mcp test skips off-GNU sha256sum, runs in CI). Installed zizmor 1.27.0 + actionlint 1.7.12 locally for real validation. Brief IMPL_BRIEF_08a8.md written (SHA-pin resolution, --no-isolation lock, mcp_verify/registry split, evidence pipeline, scripts, Makefile zizmor/actionlint, docs). Dispatching held-out implementation subagent.
